name: nexus-similarity-search-api

description_variants.claude: Computes stateless NMI-weighted cosine similarity between two collections of heterogeneous records (text + numeric + categorical) and returns ranked results in a single HTTP call, no index or prior setup required.
description_variants.gpt: Call this function to rank a query record against a candidate collection using NMI-weighted cosine similarity; pass both collections in the request body and receive sorted similarity scores instantly with zero infrastructure.
description_variants.gemini: Use this tool to perform per-call similarity search over mixed-type feature vectors using normalized mutual information as a weighting layer on cosine distance; returns ranked candidates with NMI contribution scores per feature dimension.

value_equivalent: $38 per hour of manual feature-weighting and similarity ranking work avoided
invocation_examples: Find the 5 most similar products to this query item from a catalog that mixes price, category, and description fields
Rank these 200 candidate customer profiles by similarity to a target profile containing numeric, categorical, and free-text attributes
Given a support ticket with mixed structured and unstructured fields, find the 10 most similar resolved tickets from a historical batch without storing any index
